segments.text: Hello?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Hello?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hello, good evening. Am I speaking to Konduru Praneeth?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, speak.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: This is Dr. Tasneem speaking from Tata AIA Life Insurance. This call is for your telemedical interview, so can I speak with you now?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, ma'am, you can speak.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Should I speak in Hindi or English?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: You can speak in Hindi, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So, please note, this call is being recorded for the company's quality and audit purposes. We have received your insurance proposal, and it will require a telephonic medical verification for its processing, where we will ask medical and verification details. Whatever questions there are will be based on your insurance application form, and this recorded call will take around 10 to 12 minutes. So, can I continue the call?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, please.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Whatever information you give about your health and habits, a proposal form will be made based on that. And if your proposal is accepted, then a legal contract will be formed between you and Tata AIA Life Insurance. Any wrong answer or incorrect information can affect your policy. Your policy can be terminated or rejected, and your claims can be rejected either before or after the policy is issued. So, please give all answers correctly and completely, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Your details are in front of me, so your full name is Konduru Praneeth.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Date of birth?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: What is your education level?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Graduation, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Do you do a job or business?

segments.text: I do a job, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: What is your post?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Deputy Manager at State Bank of India.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: What ID proof did you provide, Aadhaar, PAN card?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I think I gave both, ma'am, PAN and Aadhaar, both.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Please provide one card number from either of them.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Aadhaar is 955310.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Just the last four numbers, if you are giving Aadhaar.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: 3577. And where are you currently located?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I am in Guwahati, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Where?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Guwahati, Guwahati, Assam.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Guwahati. Can you spell Guwahati?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: G. U. W. A. H. A. T. I.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Guwahati, what they call it.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, yes, Guwahati.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Guwahati. Okay. Now I will ask some health-related questions. All questions are important, please answer yes or no, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Pardon me for asking these questions, but it's important. Have you consumed cigarettes, beedi, paan, gutka, tobacco, or nicotine in the last two years or do you currently consume them?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, I don't.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Have you consumed alcohol or do you consume it?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, I don't, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, has a doctor ever advised you to stop or reduce alcohol consumption, anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, it's not like that, ma'am, I don't have the habit.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, narcotics or any recreational drugs not allowed by a licensed physician and you are taking them, anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no, ma'am, nothing like that.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Please tell your height.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Height, your height.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, 6 feet 2 inches.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, and weight?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Weight is between 90-91, ma'am. 90-91 kg.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: 90 or 91, what should I write?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Write 91, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, have you ever had low or high blood pressure, high cholesterol, triglycerides, or lipids, or have you been told to undergo treatment for anything related to that? Chest pain, stress, or stress with chest pain, palpitations, difficulty breathing, or any heart-related problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no, nothing, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Cancer or any pre-cancerous condition, leukemia, enlarged nodes, non-healing skin lesion, splenomegaly, lupus, leukemia, sarcoma, tumor, polyps, cysts, nodules, lumps, or any growth?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, no.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Diabetes or elevated sugar in blood or urine, hyperthyroidism, hypothyroidism, or any thyroid or endocrine disorder?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, no, no.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, frequent coughing or prolonged coughing, sleep apnea, emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease, or any respiratory complaint?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, no.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease, or any liver problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease, or any liver problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, no.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Anemia, thalassemia, SLE, blood or any autoimmune disorder?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Anxiety, depression, fits, paralysis, stroke, transient ischemic attack, Parkinson's, multiple sclerosis, dementia, Alzheimer's, or any neurological, nervous, or mental health problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux, irritable bowel syndrome, frequent indigestion, stomach ulcer, atrophic gastritis, Barrett's esophagus, ulcerative colitis, Crohn's disease, or any problem with the pancreas, stomach, or intestines?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, no.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Kidney or gallbladder stones, kidney or urinary tract infection, blood or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula, hernia, hydrocele, or any problem with the kidney, genitals, urinary bladder, prostate, or urinary system?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Frequent backache, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular deformity, any physical disability, or any problem with muscles, bones, joints, limbs, or spine?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, spondyloarthritis, ankylosing spondylitis is the problem I have.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: You have ankylosing spondylitis, okay. Any other problems?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, nothing else.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, have you ever experienced vision loss, cataract, glaucoma, reduced vision, double vision, or any eye problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no, ma'am, no.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Hearing loss, reduced hearing, difficulty speaking, hoarseness of voice, difficulty swallowing, discharge from the ear, or any problem with the ear, nose, or throat?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no, nothing.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Any other information related to your health that we haven't asked and you want to tell?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no, nothing else, ma'am. Only that ankylosing spondylitis, besides that no other illness, nothing, everything is fine.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Have you had any tests where problems were found, like blood, urine, X-ray, ECG, CT scan, PET scan, MRI scan, endoscopy, colonoscopy, biopsy, treadmill test?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: MRI, I had it in 2022, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: For what reason was the MRI done?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, it's for the spondylitis issue, so I got an MRI done.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: When did you find out you have spondylitis? Since when have you had spondylitis?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: At that same time, I found out.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: No, no, ankylosing spondylitis, when was it diagnosed in 2020?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, it was in 2022, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: 2022, okay.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. So, for this, you had an MRI done for diagnosis?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, yes, MRI, meaning I used to have pain, so the doctor prescribed an MRI.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, and what came in the MRI?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, everything is fine, ma'am. It's just that, what do you call it, maybe because I work in a bank, sitting a lot, I might have been getting pain, but it's normal now. Medicines were given for that.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, so what treatment are you currently undergoing for it?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No treatment, ma'am. I do physical exercises daily. That's what I was told to do. I don't take any medicines now.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: What medicines were you taking before? For how many days did you take medicines?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, I took medicine for almost six months, ma'am, six months.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Do you know the name of the medicine you were taking?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Saaz, it's called Saaz, S-A-A-Z.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: S-A-A-Z, correct?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Saaz and for gastric issue, I was taking Pantop D something. Pan D.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Was it a gastric issue, or was it with Saaz, you had?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, it means these medicines were given to eat, I don't have a gastric issue otherwise.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, Pan D was given.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, Pan D was given.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And you took it for six months.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, yes.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And Saaz, how many times a day were you taking it?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, daily, one at night, ma'am. If the pain was too much, I was told to take two a day, but I used to take only one.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. And after these six months, you are not taking any medicine now for six months?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. And any complications because of your spondylitis?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no complications, I'm perfect now.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: When was your last consultation with the doctor?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: The one after six months, that was it, ma'am. It was around February 2023. The diagnosis happened around August 2022.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. So, you don't have any pain or anything now? No pain, no swelling? Or have you had any fusion in your movement, in your spine? Any abnormalities in your spine?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no, nothing like that. It was caught at a very basic stage, so now I am perfect.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, okay.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: In 2023, right?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Any other problems?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, nothing else, ma'am. Everything is fine.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, have you been on treatment for more than two weeks for any problem, or have you been advised to consult a specialist doctor, or have you been told to undergo any tests like blood, urine, X-ray, ECG, CT scan, MRI scan?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no, ma'am, no, no.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Any birth defects or any hereditary problem like cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, poliomyelitis?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, no.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Are you unable to perform any of your daily activities, or have you taken leave from work for more than two weeks, anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, nothing like that, ma'am.

segments.text: Are you married?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, yes, I am married, ma'am, I also have a child.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Have you or your wife been advised any test, treatment, or counseling for HIV, AIDS, or sexually transmitted diseases?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, no.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And besides the information you have provided, has your weight suddenly decreased or increased, or have you consulted a doctor for any problem, or been advised any surgery, anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So you declare that all the information you have provided is true and complete, and based on the information provided by you, the policy records will be prepared, okay?

segments.text: Okay, ma'am.
